name: assiette-gala
description: Assiette Gala - Plateforme de Traiteur Intelligente avec IA

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend/api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../catalog-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../event-service && npm install
scripts.prisma:generate:all: cd backend/auth-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../catalog-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../order-service && npx prisma generate && cd ../event-service && npx prisma generate
scripts.prisma:push:all: cd backend/auth-service && npx prisma db push && cd ../catalog-service && npx prisma db push && cd ../order-service && npx prisma db push && cd ../event-service && npx prisma db push

author: Assiette Gala Team
